channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Man interrupts President Ruto’s speech at Kilifi ceremony, briefly restrained by security
item.description: President William Ruto experienced a tense moment during a thanksgiving ceremony held for Principal Secretary Fikirini Jacobs in Ganze, Kilifi County, when a member of the public suddenly approached h...

item.title: California’s 2026 primaries shaped by voter frustration, party infighting, and political uncertainty
item.description: California’s upcoming June 2 primary elections are unfolding in an atmosphere of widespread political uncertainty and voter frustration, according to political analysts and campaign observers. The rac...

item.title: India Highlights Visa Challenges in Talks with US Secretary Rubio While Stressing Strategic Convergence
item.description: In a notable development, India has expressed its concerns regarding the United States' strict visa policies during the visit of US Secretary of State Marco Rubio. While maintaining a generally positi...

item.title: US, Iran and Regional Leaders Continue Talks on Ceasefire and Hormuz Reopening
item.description: The United States and Iran don continue discussions to finalise an agreement meant to formally end the Middle East conflict that started after US-Israeli strikes on Iran earlier this year. US Presiden...

item.title: CDN Vulnerability 'Underminr' Enables Hidden Malicious Traffic via Trusted Domains
item.description: Security researchers have disclosed a serious vulnerability in shared content delivery network (CDN) infrastructure dubbed “Underminr,” which allows attackers to conceal malicious communications behin...

item.title: Study highlights online safety risks and harmful digital exposure affecting children
item.description: A recent study has raised serious concerns about the growing risks children face while using the internet. The research does not focus on physical toxins as the headline suggests, but instead examines...

item.title: Supreme Court says no decision yet on Duterte, Dela Rosa main petition; clarifies TRO opinions to be released
item.description: The Supreme Court of the Philippines has clarified that it has not yet issued any ruling on the main petition filed by former President Rodrigo Roa Duterte and Senator Ronald “Bato” dela Rosa. This cl...

item.title: Taylor Swift attends Knicks game in designer outfit alongside Travis Kelce
item.description: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce were seen enjoying a courtside date night at a New York Knicks basketball game, drawing attention both for their public displays of affection and Swift’s high-end fashion...

item.title: World of Warcraft PTR Update Suggests Blizzard May Delay Patch 12.0.7
item.description: Blizzard may be adjusting the release schedule for World of Warcraft patch 12.0.7, titled “Revelations,” according to changes recently spotted on the Public Test Realm (PTR). The update is expected to...

item.title: Runner dies after collapsing during HBF Run for a Reason in Perth
item.description: A runner has died after collapsing during the HBF Run for a Reason charity event held in Perth. The incident occurred during the popular community running event, which attracts participants of varying...

item.title: Nearly 700 migrants cross the Channel in two days as yearly total exceeds 8,000
item.description: Nearly 700 migrants crossed the English Channel to the UK over a two-day period, bringing the total number of small boat arrivals so far this year to more than 8,000. According to official figures, 68...

item.title: North Dakota fossil site offers evidence of conditions immediately after the dinosaur-killing asteroid impact
item.description: The article examines the Tanis fossil site in the Hell Creek Formation of North Dakota, which has been proposed as a rare record of events occurring shortly after the Chicxulub asteroid impact 66 mill...

item.title: U.S. and Iran report progress in peace negotiations, but agreement remains incomplete
item.description: U.S. officials say negotiations between Iran and the United States have advanced meaningfully, but no final agreement has been reached. Secretary of State Marco Rubio stated that while “significant pr...

item.title: Six arrested following gang-related murder investigation in Freedom Square, Bloemfontein
item.description: Six suspects, aged between 17 and 24, have been taken into custody in connection with a gang-related murder in Freedom Square, Bloemfontein, in the Free State. The arrests were carried out by the Sout...

item.title: 11 militants killed in intelligence-based operations in North Waziristan, says ISPR
item.description: Pakistan security forces carried out multiple intelligence-based operations (IBOs) in the Datta Khel area of North Waziristan during the last 48 hours, according to a statement issued by the Inter-Ser...

item.title: Critics Highlight JD Vance’s Past Trump-Hitler Comparison After Mike Lee Condemns Similar Rhetoric
item.description: A political dispute erupted after Republican Senator Mike Lee criticized Democrats for comparing former President Donald Trump to Adolf Hitler, arguing that such rhetoric could encourage political vio...

item.title: Researchers Demonstrate Hidden Audio Attacks Against AI Voice Assistants
item.description: Researchers from China and Singapore have demonstrated a new type of cyberattack that uses inaudible audio signals to manipulate AI-powered voice assistants and chatbots. The study, presented at the I...

item.title: NDLEA arrests 63-year-old Chinese woman over 31kg cannabis seizure at Lagos airport
item.description: The National Drug Law Enforcement Agency (NDLEA) has arrested a 63-year-old Chinese woman, identified as Ting Hung Kiong, at the Murtala Muhammed International Airport (MMIA) in Lagos for allegedly at...

item.title: Tanzania partners with South Korean firms to advance Vision 2050 industrialisation goals
item.description: South Korean enterprises are positioning themselves as important partners in supporting Tanzania’s Vision 2050 development agenda, which aims to turn the country into a semi-industrialised, middle-inc...

item.title: DR Congo Health Officials Search for Ebola Patients After Fire at Treatment Centre
item.description: Health authorities in the Democratic Republic of Congo are carrying out an urgent operation to trace at least 20 Ebola patients who escaped from a treatment centre after a fire broke out at the facili...
